title: Rule-Obj-Flow
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega flow rule (Rule-Obj-Flow). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields are omitted.

pyRuleName.description: Internal name of the flow (PascalCase or underscore-separated, no spaces, no hyphens).

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label shown in the UI.

pyClassName.description: The Pega work class this flow belongs to (case-sensitive).

pyCategory.description: Flow category: FlowStandard (standard workflow), ScreenFlow (form wizard), ProcessFlow (legacy).

pyStructureType.description: Process structure type. Auto-regenerated on save but may be provided at create.

pyStartActivity.description: Name of the start shape: 'Start1' (FlowStandard) or 'Start62' (ScreenFlow). Auto-regenerated on save from pyModelProcess.

pyDraftModeON.description: Draft mode flag. False for production flows; true only for platform/system flows in draft state.

pyDescription.description: Freeform description of the flow's purpose.

pyUsage.description: Usage notes appearing in the rule header.

pyMemo.description: Developer change memo checked in with the rule.

pyRuleSet.description: Rule set the flow is saved to.

pyConfirmHarness.description: Harness rule for confirmations. Auto-derived on save.

pyStartingHarness.description: Harness shown when a new case is created (e.g., 'New', 'NewTask').

pySkipNewHarness.description: True to skip the New harness and go directly to the first assignment.

pyNextAssignment.description: True to automatically route to the next assignment after completion.

pyNextAssignmentAdhoc.description: True to allow ad-hoc routing to next assignment.

pyNextAssignmentWorkBasket.description: True to route to a workbasket after each assignment.

pyNextAssignmentWorkBasketAdhoc.description: True to allow ad-hoc workbasket routing.

pyOverlayView.description: Overlay view rule — 'None' for no overlay.

pyCanCreateWorkObject.description: True for start-case flows that create a new work object. False for subprocess, assignment, and screen flows.

pyCanStartInteractively.description: True if this flow can be launched directly.

pySLAName.description: SLA rule to apply to this flow (blank = no SLA).

pyScreenFlowHarness.description: Harness used for screen flows (usually blank).

pyShowLikelihoods.description: Display likelihood percentages on connectors in Process Modeler.

pyAcceptConversion.description: True if an older flow format should be converted to the current format.

pyAlphaSortLocalActions.description: True to sort local actions alphabetically.

pyPlaceGlobalLocalsAtTop.description: True to place global local actions above step-specific ones.

pyDoHarvesting.description: Enables result harvesting from sub-flows; usually true.

pyDeferErrors.description: When true, flow continues even if errors occur in shapes.

pyDeferCommit.description: When true, defers database commit until flow completion.

pyCreatesTemporaryObject.description: When true, work object is temporary and not permanently stored.

pzHideCaseCreationSettings.description: When true, hides case creation settings in Case Designer.

pyAssociatedImage.description: Key of an image rule associated with this flow.

pyPurpose.description: Marks this as a purpose flow (usually false).

pyEndingActivities.description: Shape names that terminate the flow. Auto-regenerated on save from pyModelProcess.

pyFromTasks.description: Flow navigation map — shape connectivity entries. Auto-regenerated on save.

pyModelProcess.description: Complete flow canvas: shapes, connectors, annotations.

pyShapes.description: PageGroup of shapes keyed by pyMOId.

pyConnectors.description: PageGroup of connectors keyed by connector ID.

pyAnnotationShapes.description: PageGroup of annotation shapes (text boxes, comments).

pyPagesAndClasses.description: Named pages used by this flow.

pyLocalActions.description: Local flow actions available in assignments (Embed-Pega-AssignAction).

pyPrivilegeList.description: Access privileges required to execute this flow.

pyWhensList.description: When conditions referenced by this flow.

pyStencils.description: Stencil names available in Process Modeler.

pyModelerDefaultClickMode.description: Default mouse mode in Process Modeler.

pyModelerGuideModeON.description: Show guide lines in Process Modeler.

pyModelerGridModeON.description: Show dot grid in Process Modeler.

pyBaseRule.description: Indicates whether this is a base (hiding) rule.

pyBaseRuleHolder.description: Companion flag for pyBaseRule indicating hiding rule status.

pyCoveredByCount.description: Number of test cases covering this flow rule.

pyDisplayMode.description: Authoring display mode: clone, basic, specialize, or empty.

pyForecasterAvailable.description: Forecaster availability status for the flow.

pyHasCustomFields.description: True if the rule has custom fields defined.

pyHideLockIcon.description: True to hide the lock icon in the authoring UI.

pyHistoryObject.description: Indicates whether the record being viewed is a history record.

pyLabelOld.description: Previous label value before the last rename.

pyOriginalRFB.description: Original ruleset/branch key for this flow.

pyPostVisio2000Saved.description: True if flow was edited and saved with Visio 2002 or later.

pyRefreshViewHint.description: Hint flag to trigger view refresh in the authoring UI.

pyReloadForm.description: When set, causes the rule form to reload.

pySelected.description: Selection state flag for list/select UI.

pyShowROIcon.description: True to show the read-only icon in the authoring UI.

pySortDateCircumWithinRSMajor.description: True to sort by date within the major ruleset version rather than by full version number.

pySubProcessCategory.description: Rule-level subprocess category: ProcessFlow or ScreenFlow.

pySystemFlow.description: True if this is a special system flow.

pyTemplateDisplayText.description: Display text for the ruleset template palette.

pyValueChanged.description: Flag indicating a value has changed on the rule form.

pyVisioCompatFlag.description: True if there is a potential backward compatibility conflict in JPEG rendering.

pyVisioRFB.description: Ruleset/branch key associated with Visio rendering.

pyVisioScaleFactor.description: Scale factor for Visio JPEG rendering as a percentage.

FlowFromTask.description: A single source shape entry in the flow navigation map (Embed-Rule-Obj-Flow-FromTasks).

pyFromTaskName.description: Source shape name (must match a pyMOId in pyModelProcess.pyShapes).

pyToTasks.description: PageGroup of outgoing transitions keyed by destination shape name.

pyID.description: Connector ID (must match a connector in pyModelProcess.pyConnectors).

pyTaskStatusOrWhen.description: Condition type: 'ALWAYS', 'STATUS', 'WHEN', 'ELSE', or a result value.

pyLikelihood.description: Probability percentage. ELSE branches use negative values.

pyHistoryText.description: History text logged when this transition fires. Usually empty; can contain status labels or expressions on STATUS/WHEN/ELSE branches.

FlowShape.description: A single shape in the flow canvas (Data-MO-* class hierarchy).

pxObjClass.description: Shape class: Data-MO-Event-Start, Data-MO-Event-End, Data-MO-Activity-Assignment, Data-MO-Activity-Utility, Data-MO-Activity-SubProcess, Data-MO-Gateway-Decision, etc.

pyMOName.description: Display name shown on the canvas.

pyFromMODefName.description: Shape template type: Start, End, Assignment, AssignmentSF, Utility, SubProcess, Decision, GenerativeAI, Wait, SendAMessage, AskAQuestion.

pyImplementation.description: What the shape executes: activity name (Utility), 'WorkList'/'WorkBasket' (Assignment), flow name (SubProcess), Decision Table/Tree/MapValue rule name (Decision with backing rule), bare property reference e.g. '.PropertyName' (Decision EXPRESSION — no function calls or operator expressions allowed).
Router name: ToCurrentOperator, ToWorklist, ToWorkbasket, ToSkilledGroup.

pyLocalActionsPL.description: Local actions on this assignment shape.

pzRuleParamsHolder.description: Parameter holder for smart shape UI pre-population.

pyRuleParamsStreamName.description: Smart shape UI stream name for Process Modeler parameter editor.

pyDecisionClass.description: Decision gateway class: EXPRESSION, Rule-Declare-DecisionTable, Rule-Declare-DecisionTree, Data-MO-Gateway-DataXOR, Rule-Obj-MapValue, Rule-Decision-PredictiveModel, Rule-Decision-Scorecard.

pyTaskInfo.description: Decision task info (e.g., pyDecisionMapType, pyDecisionMap for Decision Trees).

pyFromTasks.description: Embedded routing branches for Decision shapes.

pySpinOff.description: True to create a new work object (spin-off).

pyActivityTypeSelector.description: Activity type selector for Utility shapes.

pySLA.description: SLA rule name for Wait shapes.

pxObjClass.description: Connector class — must be 'Data-MO-Connector-Transition'. Required by the server to resolve the VALIDTRANSITIONS map value rule.

pyMOId.description: Unique connector ID (must match the PageGroup key). Required by the server.

pyExpression.description: When rule name (for When) or FlowAction name (for Action) or result value (for Status).

pyModel.description: Data Transform name applied on this transition.

pyLikelihood.description: Probability percentage. ELSE branches use negative values.

pyAuditNote.description: History text logged when the transition fires.

pyConnectorPoints.description: Visual waypoints for the connector path.

pyPropertyAssigns.description: Property-set operations executed on this transition.

pyParametersParamType.description: Data type. Values from pyLoadDataTypes data transform.

pyUseCaseApplication.description: Application name for the use case.

pyUseCaseWorkType.description: Work type for the use case.
